examples: If these differences correspond with the differences in the hemispheric trunkline, there is an unalterable distinction between the sexes.
Many things about them are absolutely the same and unalterable.
The fact that the two vessels did sink is an unalterable fact of history.
We don't recognize, as an unalterable fact, the rights of local mafias to hold neighborhoods hostage.
The power of words over reality cannot be unlimited since, fortunately, reality imposes its own unalterable conditions.
